name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit records whether public A4MC L2 source-term extension points exist before any powered-source executor is wired.
note: Primary powered-source API surface audit.

name: l2_bridge_capability_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge supplies reflected L2 base capability status for runL2 request builder masks flow atlas and force moment results.
note: Base L2 capability input.

name: upstream_aero_l2_request
value: AeroL2Request exposes grid inlet air solid mask initial flow atlas and force moment request controls but no public powered-source extension point at the referenced commit.
note: Upstream request API reference.

name: upstream_aero_l2_result
value: AeroL2Result exposes flow atlas and force moment outputs but no source-term runtime delta channel at the referenced commit.
note: Upstream result API reference.

name: upstream_aero_l2_force_moment
value: AeroL2ForceMoment exposes net force moment center of pressure and reference point components used for static baseline subtraction.
note: Upstream force moment API reference.

name: l2_powered_source_physical_contract
value: Powered-source API readiness also requires SI source units body-frame source placement source time-step semantics force-moment deltas and conservation residual outputs before executor wiring.
note: Physical contract guard for future public powered-source extension points.

name: surface_probe_rule
value: Require base L2 run request mask flow-atlas and force-moment support plus public body-force porous rotor-source envelope runtime-result source-term extension points SI units body-frame source placement source time-step semantics force-moment deltas and conservation residuals before wiring any powered-source executor.
note: Method row for powered-source API surface readiness.
